name: Juicy Corn
recipeIngredient: 5 Ears fresh corn or 1 can cream-style corn
salt and pepper to desired season
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. If using fresh corn, shuck off the kernels into a large bowl. Melt the margarine in a casserole dish.
3. In another bowl, mix the whole kernels or fresh corn with sugar, salt, pepper, and flour.
4. If using fresh corn, add 1 1/2 cups of water; if using canned corn, add the can of cream-style corn and stir well.
5. Pour the corn mixture into the casserole dish with the melted margarine.
6. Cook in the oven for 1 1/2 hours. Delicious.
